channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: British Steel Nationalisation Sparks Compensation Claims and Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: The UK government has nationalised British Steel, prompting the Chinese firm Jingye Group to demand full compensation through legal means. The decision came after Jingye announced plans to close the S...

item.title: Current AI launches open-source AI infrastructure to empower global communities
item.description: Current AI, a nonprofit founded in 2025, is developing open-source AI tools to address language inequality and cultural preservation. Partnering with Bhashini, India's government AI division, they cre...

item.title: Mali rebels ambush military convoy, killing or capturing dozens of soldiers as security forces retaliate
item.description: Rebels in Mali ambushed a military convoy in the north, killing or capturing dozens of soldiers. The attack, attributed to Islamic militants and a separatist group, prompted the Malian army to launch ...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe sets new FIFA World Cup scoring record with 10 goals
item.description: France's Kylian Mbappe made history by becoming the all-time leading scorer in FIFA World Cup history after netting two goals in France's 6-4 bronze-medal defeat against England on July 18, 2026. The ...

item.title: Sen. Marsha Blackburn Dismisses CNBC Report Ranking Tennessee as Worst State for 2026
item.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) criticized a CNBC report that ranked Tennessee as the worst state to live in 2026, calling the findings 'laughable.' The report, which used metrics like crime rates, air q...

item.title: American Boxer Hannah Rapp Dies in Road Accident
item.description: American boxer Hannah Rapp, 26, died after being struck by a vehicle while cycling in Brazos County, Texas. The incident occurred just weeks after she challenged for the WBC women's featherweight titl...

item.title: Yung Lean Marks 30th Birthday with Bladee at Electric Castle 2026
item.description: Yung Lean, the Swedish rapper, celebrated his 30th birthday during his performance at Electric Castle 2026, a Romanian music festival held in the grounds of Banffy Castle. The event, which took place ...

item.title: Banyana goalkeeping unity shines as Dlamini and Swart focus on Wafcon success
item.description: Andile Dlamini, Banyana Banyana's first-choice goalkeeper, has emphasized her friendship with fellow keeper Kaylin Swart, urging fans to avoid creating divisions within the squad ahead of the Women's ...

item.title: Tanzania outlines key priorities for advancing the New Urban Agenda
item.description: The article discusses Tanzania's strategic focus on implementing the New Urban Agenda, emphasizing infrastructure development, sustainable urban planning, and community engagement. It highlights the g...

item.title: Russian Missile Strike on Kyiv Causes Civilian Casualties and Highlights Air Defense Challenges
item.description: A Russian missile attack on Kyiv resulted in one fatality and 16 injuries, underscoring Ukraine's limited air defense capabilities. The strike, which occurred overnight, involved 41 missiles and 125 d...

item.title: Jaxson Dart's girlfriend documents patriotic July 4th adventures and Bigfoot folklore
item.description: The article details Marissa Ayers, the swimsuit model and girlfriend of NFL quarterback Jaxson Dart, who shared her July 4th celebrations featuring a patriotic sunset cruise and cave explorations. She...

item.title: Fatal crash on R612 near Ixopo claims five lives
item.description: A Volkswagen Polo crashed into a roadside barrier on the R612 near Ixopo in KwaZulu-Natal, killing five people and injuring another. The incident occurred around 9:10pm on Saturday night, with three w...

item.title: Tanzania-Egypt collaboration boosts trade and investment prospects
item.description: The Tanzania-Egypt forum convened to discuss strategies for enhancing bilateral trade and investment opportunities. Participants emphasized the importance of collaborative efforts to address market ba...

item.title: Sydney Sweeney Promotes Her Lingerie Line After Emmy Snub
item.description: Sydney Sweeney, 28, has responded to her recent snub from the Primetime Emmy Awards by leveraging her new lingerie brand, SYRN, to promote her line. Despite not receiving a Best Supporting Actress nom...

item.title: Trump Criticizes UK Wind Turbines on Social Media Amid Escalating U.S.-Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump drew criticism after posting comments on Truth Social about aging wind turbines in Aberdeen, Scotland, while tensions between the United States and Iran continued to escalate fo...

item.title: International Students Face Work Permit Crisis After Policy Change
item.description: Hundreds of international students in Calgary, Canada, are in turmoil after Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) rejected their post-graduation work permit applications. The students, p...

item.title: Speaker Abbas and Gov Uba Sani Reaffirm Cordial Relationship and Commitment to Kaduna State Development
item.description: Speaker of the House of Representatives, Abbas Tajudeen, has categorically denied rumors of a rift with Kaduna State Governor Uba Sani, emphasizing their cordial working relationship built on trust an...

item.title: Nova Scotia Studio Develops Party Game Inspired by Local Forests
item.description: A new studio based in Nova Scotia is creating a party game that draws inspiration from the region's natural forests. The project, which aims to highlight the unique ecosystems and cultural significanc...

item.title: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli takes pole position for Belgian Grand Prix as Oscar Piastri faces challenge
item.description: The Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps has seen Mercedes' 19-year-old driver Kimi Antonelli secure pole position, marking his sixth pole of the season and the team's 19th consecutive pole. Antone...

item.title: Lorna Kapunan's Role in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial and Her Legal Career
item.description: Lorna Kapunan, a prominent lawyer and former television host, is a key figure in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. Known for her advocacy for justice and women's rights, she joined...
